package rulefixtures

import (
	"sync"
)

// scenario for shared_slice_append_race: goroutines appending to a shared slice without synchronization
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario732Negative(items []string) []string {
	out := make([]string, len(items))
	var wg sync.WaitGroup
	for index, item := range items {
		index, item := index, item
		wg.Add(1)
		go func() { defer wg.Done(); out[index] = item }()
	}
	wg.Wait()
	return out
}
